description_long: This is a modern, mid-sized silver SUV with a sleek, aerodynamic body and a prominent front grille featuring horizontal chrome slats. The vehicle has four doors, tinted windows, and a sunroof, giving it a premium and urban appearance. The headlights are angular and integrated smoothly into the front fenders, while the rear features vertical taillights and a subtle trunk lip. The wheels are multi-spoke alloys, adding to the sporty yet refined look. Chrome accents are visible around the windows and on the door handles, enhancing its upscale feel. The overall design suggests a comfortable, family-oriented vehicle suitable for city driving and suburban environments.
description: A silver, modern SUV with a sleek body, chrome accents, sunroof, and multi-spoke alloy wheels.
description_view_0: Front three-quarter view showing the bold grille, angular headlights, and sunroof.
description_view_1: Rear three-quarter view highlighting the taillights, trunk, and side profile.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the trunk, taillights, and rear bumper details.
description_view_3: Side-front angle emphasizing the front fender, wheels, and chrome window trim.
attribute_wheel_design: multi-spoke alloy wheels with a polished metallic finish
